kiln — deploy openclaw

$ kiln deploy openclaw

> selecting channel

Deploy your OpenClaw agent.
Ship it in 30 minutes.

Pick your channel. Add your API keys. KILN deploys your OpenClaw agent to Fly.io — always-on, connected to Discord, Telegram, or Slack.

Deploy an agent →See how it works

Three steps. Agent live.

No server configs. No Docker. No reading docs for three hours.

01

Pick your channel

Choose Discord, Telegram, Slack, or web. Your agent connects to your existing accounts — no new apps to manage.

02

Add your API keys

OpenAI, Anthropic, Google Gemini, or MiniMax. Plus your Discord/Telegram bot tokens. We verify everything before deployment.

03

Fire the kiln

We spin up your OpenClaw agent on Fly.io, wire all your keys, and send you a live URL — typically under 3 minutes.

Everything included.

One agent. All your channels. Your choice of model.

Always-on

Your agent runs on Fly.io — not your laptop

Discord

Full server access, thread-aware, slash commands

Telegram

Bot token, DM support, group access

Slack

Workspace app with full event API

Web UI

Browser-based chat + gateway dashboard

OpenAI

GPT-4o, o1, o3 with streaming

Anthropic

Claude 3.5, 3 Opus with tool use

Your keys

Bring your own API keys — you control costs

Simple pricing.

Plus your API key costs. No surprise bills.

Starter

Free

For trying it out.

  • ✓ 1 agent
  • ✓ Discord channel
  • ✓ GPT-3.5 only
  • ✓ 100 messages/day
  • ✓ Community support
